## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Engine and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and AI/LLM visibility initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows steady growth in Q3, with expense/financial management content performing strongest](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic growing, especially from Claude and Poe](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Plans to create a glossary and industry-specific FAQs to improve content structure and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Need to address lingering "Hotel Engine" branding issues in website code and content](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Developing a focused content strategy with emphasis on finance-related aspects and better categorization](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Steady growth in Q3, particularly in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Expense and financial management content performing strongest](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Growth seen in industry-specific content, technology solutions, and calculators/practical tools](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Peruvian page with calculators showing good traction](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### LLM Referral Traffic

  - [Overall steady growth](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Significant increase from Claude and Poe in the last week](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [ChatGPT remains dominant for Engine's customer base](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [LLM presence up \~8-10 percentage points from previous week](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Branding and Visibility Challenges

  - [Confusion between "Hotel Engine" and "Engine" branding persists](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Potential visibility issues due to inconsistent branding](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Need to update source code, schema markup, and content to consistently use "Engine"](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Fewer users searching for "Hotel Engine," indicating some brand recognition improvement](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

### Content Strategy Improvements

  - [Proposal to create a glossary and industry-specific FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Plans to structure content more effectively, possibly using Webflow CMS collections](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Consideration of adding templates (e.g., travel policies) to complement content recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Focus on finance-related aspects and consolidating content categories for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

### AI/LLM Visibility Initiatives

  - [Ongoing efforts to improve LLM visibility as part of quarterly OKRs](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [GrowthX working on comprehensive study of signals affecting AI/LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Discussion of differences between various LLM platforms (e.g., Perplexity vs. ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to develop focused content strategy incorporating Reddit research insights](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Review and update "What is Engine" article, redirecting old version](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [Joel to check with Barry regarding the logic behind the current "What is Engine" article](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Investigate and clean up remaining "Hotel Engine" references in website source code](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [GrowthX to share insights from ongoing AI/LLM visibility research](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Joel to share iPollRank webinar content on how answer engines work](https://fathom.video/share/yKbYsnphJ2tPVhD6SN93xzgRx6AJhsVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
